title: Cheilosoria hancockii
intro: Cheilosoria hancockii, also known as Hancock's lip fern, is a species of fern in the family Cheilanthaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of conditions such as arthritis and skin infections. The bioactive constituents of Cheilosoria hancockii include flavonoids, terpenoids, and phenolic compounds, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Cheilosoria hancockii is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in topical applications such as creams and salves.
